name: Firedancer Development
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y curl diffutils build-essential pkgconf zstd gzip cmake clang clangd libclang-dev libudev-dev protobuf-compiler autoconf automake autopoint bison flex gcc-multilib gettext llvm lcov libgmp-dev perl git && git submodule update --init --recursive
